arts.ttl: Manchester United can make 'massive statement' under Ruben Amorim against Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United face Arsenal on Wednesday night with the Gunners looking to extend their lead at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Gabriel starts, Partey decision made - Arsenal predicted XI vs Manchester United
arts.sum: "You can see his fingerprints in what he wants to do straight away," Arteta said of Amorim's impact in his pre-match press conference . There is an argument that Mikel Arteta might have preferred to play Manchester United a few weeks ago.

arts.ttl: Report: Man Utd eyeing Bayern Munich midfielder after Ruben Amorim request
arts.sum: Manchester United have been linked with Bayern Munich midfielder Konrad Laimer, following reports in Germany that Ruben Amorim is interested in the 27-year-old.

arts.ttl: Arsenal open to big-name January sale after 'legal dispute'
arts.sum: Arsenal are open to letting Gabriel Jesus go in the winter, but a transfer could be difficult as the player is currently without an agent following a 'legal dispute,' according to Brazilian media. Jesus' agent lost the player due to a 'legal dispute' and it seems that the report does not expect the situation to be resolved before January.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans 'disappointed' after team backed into corner by Rainbow jacket refusal
arts.sum: Manchester United's LGBT+ supporters group the Rainbow Devils have spoken out on the reports that a player refused to wear a jacket in support of Rainbow Laces ahead of the win over Everton

arts.ttl: ‘They have to’: Ian Wright says there’s three Arsenal players who really need to improve now
arts.sum: Arsenal have some serious ground to make up if they want to win the Premier League title. The Gunners are nine points adrift of Liverpool...

arts.ttl: I should never have left Arsenal - I regretted Man Utd move after one training session - football.london
arts.sum: Alexis Sanchez was left wishing he had never moved from Arsenal to Manchester United in 2018 after just one training session. He hit the ground running by winning the FA Cup in his first season in north London, scoring 25 goals in all competitions, and clinching the club's Player of the Year award .

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Manchester United live Premier League updates, team news and Ruben Amorim latest
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates from the Emirates Stadium as Man United face Arsenal in the Premier League on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: How does Harry Maguire feel about contract situation?
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire is reportedly still waiting to learn whether he will have his contract extended at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer news: Napoli 'ready to attack' for in-demand defender
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea allegedly face a race against time to remain in the race to sign a leading Serie A prospect.
